title: plantago australis subsp. supina
intro: Plantago australis subsp. supina is a subspecies of the plantain plant, native to Australia, characterized by its broad leaves and small flowers. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Plantago australis subsp. supina include its ability to reduce swelling and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, as well as its potential to treat skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to utilize its medicinal properties.
